notableEvents.label: Javier Báez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Javier Báez hit by pitch. Spencer Torkelson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Jeffers reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Kevin McGonigle.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Jeffers reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Kevin McGonigle.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones flies out to right fielder Matt Wallner. Spencer Torkelson to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Austin Martin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Martin grounds into a double play, shortstop Javier Báez to second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Brooks Lee to 3rd. Byron Buxton out at 2nd. Austin Martin out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Austin Martin grounds into a double play, shortstop Javier Báez to second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Brooks Lee to 3rd. Byron Buxton out at 2nd. Austin Martin out at 1st.
